tests.scenario: The user sets a sleep schedule and receives reminders
steps: Verify reminders are sent 30 minutes before bedtime and wake-up time
tests.expected_result: Reminders are sent 30 minutes before bedtime and wake-up time

tests.scenario: The user views their sleep report
steps: Use the system for at least 7 days
Verify report displays average sleep duration, sleep stages, and time spent awake
tests.expected_result: Report displays average sleep duration, sleep stages, and time spent awake

tests.scenario: The user uses the white noise generator
steps: Verify continuous soothing sound is played
tests.expected_result: Continuous soothing sound is played

tests.scenario: The user uses the smart alarm
steps: Verify wake-up time is within a 30-minute window of desired wake-up time
tests.expected_result: Wake-up time is within a 30-minute window of desired wake-up time

tests.scenario: The user integrates with popular sleep and relaxation apps
steps: Verify information from integrated apps is displayed
tests.expected_result: Information from integrated apps is displayed

tests.scenario: The user receives a daily summary of sleep data
steps: Use system for at least 1 day
Verify sleep data, quality, and suggestions for improvement are displayed
tests.expected_result: Sleep data, quality, and suggestions for improvement are displayed

tests.scenario: The user sets reminders for relaxing activities
steps: Verify reminder is sent 30 minutes before bedtime
tests.expected_result: Reminder is sent 30 minutes before bedtime

tests.scenario: The user accesses guided meditations and relaxation techniques
steps: Verify guided audio recording is played
tests.expected_result: Guided audio recording is played

tests.scenario: The user tracks environmental factors
steps: Verify information on environmental factors is displayed
tests.expected_result: Information on environmental factors is displayed

tests.scenario: The user sets and tracks goals for improving sleep quality
steps: Verify progress towards achieving goal is displayed
tests.expected_result: Progress towards achieving goal is displayed

tests.scenario: The user views past payment history
steps: Verify list of payments made in last 12 months is displayed
tests.expected_result: List of payments made in last 12 months is displayed

tests.scenario: The user sets up automatic recurring payments
steps: Opt to set up automatic recurring payments
Verify frequency can be chosen and setup is confirmed
tests.expected_result: Frequency can be chosen and setup is confirmed

tests.scenario: The user receives reminders for upcoming bill due dates
steps: Verify reminder notification is sent to preferred communication method
tests.expected_result: Reminder notification is sent to preferred communication method

tests.scenario: The user updates payment information
steps: Verify prompt to update payment information is displayed
tests.expected_result: Prompt to update payment information is displayed

tests.scenario: The user views bill details
steps: Verify due date, amount, and payment instructions are displayed clearly
tests.expected_result: Due date, amount, and payment instructions are displayed clearly

tests.scenario: The user tracks payment status
tests.expected_result: Updated status is displayed

tests.scenario: The user makes a payment
steps: Verify payment information is encrypted and confirmation is received
tests.expected_result: Payment information is encrypted and confirmation is received

tests.scenario: The user views and manages scheduled payments
steps: Verify list of upcoming payments is displayed and can be modified or canceled
tests.expected_result: List of upcoming payments is displayed and can be modified or canceled

tests.scenario: The user views payment fees or charges
steps: Verify any applicable fees or charges are displayed clearly
tests.expected_result: Any applicable fees or charges are displayed clearly

tests.scenario: The user uses guided meditation
tests.expected_result: Session plays without interruption

tests.scenario: The user customizes meditation experience
tests.expected_result: Session matches selections

tests.scenario: The user enables ambient sounds or visuals
steps: Choose to enable ambient sounds or visuals
Verify calming sounds or visuals are played or displayed
tests.expected_result: Calming sounds or visuals are played or displayed

tests.scenario: The user tracks meditation progress
steps: Verify date, time, and duration of session are displayed
tests.expected_result: Date, time, and duration of session are displayed
